sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_intervals (id Int32, start_date Date, interval_data IntervalQuarter);
INSERT INTO test_intervals (id, start_date, interval_data) VALUES (1, toDate('2024-01-01'), toIntervalQuarter(2));
UPDATE test_intervals SET start_date = start_date + toIntervalQuarter(1) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, start_date + toIntervalQuarter(3) AS new_date FROM test_intervals;
SELECT id, interval_data FROM test_intervals WHERE interval_data = toIntervalQuarter(2);
